blended.narrative: Bluewood is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,438 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 9.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 32".
